name: HMZ — Google Chat Supervised Reply Console

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ token: (($json.headers && ($json.headers.authorization || $json.headers.Authorization)) || '').replace(/^Bearer\s+/i,''), event: { userName: ($json.body?.user?.name || $json.body?.message?.sender?.name || ''), userType: ($json.body?.user?.type || $json.body?.message?.sender?.type || ''), userEmail: ($json.body?.user?.email || $json.body?.message?.sender?.email || ''), displayName: ($json.body?.user?.displayName || ''), domainId: ($json.body?.user?.domainId || ''), space: ($json.body?.space?.name || $json.body?.message?.space?.name || ''), thread: ($json.body?.message?.thread?.name || '') } }) }}

parameters.content:
## HMZ — Google Chat Supervised Reply Console
Human-written, human-approved sending ONLY. Never auto-generates or auto-sends.
Google bearer token verified via hmz-reply-console sidecar (OIDC). Owner-only. One-use tokens + atomic send-lock. SEND_UNCERTAIN is never auto-retried.
